_comment: exp_307: SPY + XLI + XLF independent credit spread underlyings. Each runs its own combo regime detector (price/MA/RSI on that ticker's prices). Safe Kelly 4/7/9 sizing: bull=9%, neutral=7%, bear=4%. Equal 33% allocation. Target: +80 independent trades/yr, Sharpe > 6.0.
_hypothesis: Adding XLI+XLF as independent underlyings with per-ticker combo regime adds ~80 uncorrelated trades/year (40 per ticker). At low cross-ticker correlation (<0.3), this lifts effective N_independent from 45 to 125, projecting Sharpe from 2.60 to 6.0+.
